((agent_id = auth.uid()) OR (customer_id = auth.uid()) OR (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM profiles
  WHERE ((profiles.id = auth.uid()) AND (profiles.role = 'admin'::text)))))

with_check_expression:
((agent_id = auth.uid()) AND (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM profiles
  WHERE ((profiles.id = auth.uid()) AND (profiles.role = ANY (ARRAY['agent'::text, 'admin'::text]))))))

using_expression: true

((agent_id = auth.uid()) OR (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM profiles
  WHERE ((profiles.id = auth.uid()) AND (profiles.role = 'admin'::text)))))
